Sea Ice Index

The Sea Ice Index provides a quick look at Arctic- and Antarctic-wide changes in sea ice. It is derived from NASA-developed passive microwave data.

Data Access

Monthly sea ice extent and area data files (106 km2):

  • Northern Hemisphere Monthly Sea Ice Extent and Area (CSV)
  • Southern Hemisphere Monthly Sea Ice Extent and Area (CSV)

About

Data are produced by the Sea Ice Index team at NSIDC. Extent is defined as the total area of ocean with at least 15% sea ice concentration.
